_meta.description: Context facts that live in the memory store but are NOT deletion targets. Two roles: 'entailing' facts are the operands that let a multi-hop target be re-derived (referenced by multi_hop_facts.json -> entailed_by / co_delete_required); 'bystander' facts are innocent and should NEVER be touched by a good planner (they measure collateral damage). All persons are fictional.

facts.subject: Alice Chen
facts.text: Alice Chen is a Senior Software Engineer at Google Singapore.
facts.utterance: I work as a Senior Software Engineer at Google Singapore.

facts.subject: Google Singapore
facts.text: At Google Singapore, the Senior Software Engineer monthly salary band is SGD 8,000-9,000.
facts.utterance: I read that Senior SWEs at Google Singapore earn about SGD 8,000-9,000 a month.

facts.subject: Bob Tan
